parts.name: Web Client
parts.notes: Hybrid client state. Newer role-specific flows use useAppData() and the REST API, while older generic dashboards still read src/lib/db.ts directly.

parts.name: API Server
parts.notes: Bootstraps PostgreSQL tables on startup, seeds default data, and persists sessions in the database.

supporting_assets.name: Retained Supabase assets
supporting_assets.notes: Contains retained migrations, generated types, and a Deno Edge Function for AI chat/newsletter generation.

supporting_assets.name: Deployment automation
supporting_assets.notes: Contains deploy, backup, restore, and restore-test shell scripts for VPS operations.

supporting_assets.name: Nginx configuration
supporting_assets.notes: Serves the built SPA and proxies /api requests to the Node API.

integration_points.details: src/lib/api.ts calls /api endpoints. Vite proxies to 127.0.0.1:3001 in development and Nginx proxies /api in production.
server/db.ts creates tables, seeds teams/users/entries, and backs connect-pg-simple session storage.
src/integrations/supabase/client.ts is stubbed, but generated types, migrations, and Edge Function code remain in source control.
supabase/functions/ai-chat/index.ts forwards chat and newsletter prompts when deployed with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
